name: Mariah Carey
bio: Mariah Carey's catalog remains exceptionally valuable because it combines evergreen seasonal income with major pop and R&B streaming demand.
notable_for: One of the strongest evergreen holiday songs in modern music plus a deep mainstream hit catalog.
career_highlight: All I Want for Christmas Is You resets her annual earnings profile every holiday season at a scale few catalogs can match.

earnings.assumptions: Modeled from holiday-season catalog concentration, global pop/R&B streaming, publishing upside, and writer participation on key songs.

ownership.master_owner: Major-label masters with artist-side royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears unusually valuable because Carey is a writer on major catalog assets
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No broad catalog sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: Seasonal concentration can make annual results more volatile than ordinary catalog pages.
